sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text: Tired of pimple marks, dark spots, pigmentation traces and open pores?Nuskhe by Paras Anti-blemish face mask is made with Ayurvedic goodness to bring the ultimate skin correction formula to you. With the goodness of Spirulina, willow bark extract, tea tree and tulsi. It makes sure that your skin texture and pigment go back to its healthy, blemish-free self.Use twice a week for the best results!◙ NOTE:- People with sensitive skin are advised to perform a patch test. If a rash, redness, or itching appears, stop using it.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
*Product Type: Anti-Blemish Face Mask

*Skin Focus: Blemishes, oiliness, dullness, uneven texture, and impurities

*Purifying Ingredients: Neem, Tea Tree Oil, Basil Oil & Rosemary Extract

*Soothing Support: Aloe Barbadensis Extract

*Glow Support: Spirulina, Lime Essential Oil & Goji Berry Extract

*Suitable For: Men & Women

*Net Weight: 50g

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
*Willow Bark Extract

Helps gently exfoliate the skin and supports a clearer-looking complexion.

*Spirulina Extract

Rich in skin-loving nutrients that help refresh dull and tired-looking skin.

*Ginger Extract

Supports skin clarity and gives the formula a warm, revitalizing touch.

*Lime Essential Oil

Helps refresh the skin and supports a brighter, cleaner-looking appearance.

*Basil Oil

Known for its soothing and purifying feel, helping skin look fresh and balanced.

*Rosemary Extract

Supports skin freshness and helps maintain a clean, healthy-looking complexion.

*Neem Extract

Helps care for blemish-prone skin and supports a clearer skin look.

*Tea Tree Oil

Known for helping control excess oil and supporting blemish care.

*Aloe Barbadensis Extract

Soothes the skin and helps keep it calm, soft, and comfortable.

*Goji Berry Extract

Adds antioxidant-rich care and supports a healthy, refreshed glow.

*Cinnamon Extract

Helps revive dull-looking skin and supports a fresh, energized feel.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
🌿 Helps Reduce Blemishes

Neem, Tea Tree Oil, Willow Bark, and Basil help support blemish-prone skin and improve clarity.

✨ Refreshes Dull Skin

Spirulina, Lime Essential Oil, and Goji Berry help skin look fresher, brighter, and more active.

🧼 Supports Oil Control

Tea Tree Oil and Neem help manage excess oil and keep the skin feeling clean.

💚 Soothes & Comforts Skin

Aloe Barbadensis Extract helps calm the skin and reduce the feeling of dryness or irritation.

🌱 Gently Purifies Skin

Herbal extracts help remove surface impurities and support a clearer complexion.

🍃 Improves Skin Texture

Willow Bark Extract helps smoothen the skin by supporting gentle exfoliation.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Apply on face and neck and spread evenly and keep it for 15-20 minutes. Just before it begins to dry, wash with water, massaging with fingertips. Pat dry and use a suitable Moisturizer.
